sentences.arabic: فَازَ فَرِيقُ كُرَةِ السَّلَّةِ الْمَحَلِّيُّ بِبُطُولَةِ الدَّوْرِيِّ الْوَطَنِيِّ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فِي تَارِيخِهِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalni košarkaški tim je prvi put u svojoj historiji osvojio titulu nacionalne lige.
sentences.translationEn: The local basketball team won the national league championship for the first time in its history.

sentences.arabic: احْتَشَدَ الْجُمْهُورُ فِي الْمَلْعَبِ لِمُشَاهَدَةِ الْمُبَارَاةِ النِّهَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Navijači su se okupili na stadionu da pogledaju finale.
sentences.translationEn: The crowd gathered at the arena to watch the final match.

sentences.arabic: أَحْرَزَ الْفَرِيقُ ثَمَانِينَ نُقْطَةً مُقَابِلَ سِتِّينَ نُقْطَةً لِلْفَرِيقِ الْمُنَافِسِ.
sentences.translation: Tim je postigao osamdeset poena naspram šezdeset poena protivničkog tima.
sentences.translationEn: The team scored eighty points against sixty points for the opposing team.

sentences.arabic: رَقَصَ الْمُشَجِّعُونَ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ احْتِفَالًا بِهَذَا الْفَوْزِ الْكَبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Navijači su plesali po ulicama proslavljajući ovu veliku pobjedu.
sentences.translationEn: Fans danced in the streets celebrating this great victory.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ الْمُدَرِّبُ بِأَنَّ الْفَرِيقَ سَيُكَافِحُ لِلدِّفَاعِ عَنِ اللَّقَبِ فِي الْمَوْسِمِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Trener je obećao da će tim se boriti da odbrani titulu naredne sezone.
sentences.translationEn: The coach promised that the team will fight to defend the title next season.
